title: Magnetic Fields in Massive Star-forming Regions (MagMaR). VII. On the dynamical importance of B-fields in massive protocluster W33 A
comment: Main text: 15 pages, 8 figures. Appendix: 3 pages. Accepted for publication in Astronomy & Astrophysics
summary: Magnetic fields (B-fields) are likely important in massive protocluster formation, but their role remains poorly constrained. We present 1.2 mm ALMA full-polarization observations of W33 A, a massive star-forming region at 2.4 kpc, with an angular resolution of 0.3 arcsec (730 au). The region is resolved into 20 dense cores and 9 filaments. The plane-of-sky B-field, inferred from linearly polarized dust emission, shows diverse structures: two nearly perpendicular large-scale components oriented northwest-southeast (NW-SE) and northeast-southwest (NE-SW), and two localized features toward the millimeter peaks MM1 and MM2. The NW-SE component could be shaped by a molecular outflow. The NE-SW component is coherent along the main filaments F1, F-Main, and Tail, all of which show trans-Alfvenic turbulence. In F-Main, the line mass exceeds the turbulent critical value, implying that magnetic support is required to prevent radial collapse and suppress fragmentation. In F1 and Tail, turbulence alone can support the gas against gravity, although B-fields may provide additional support. Toward MM1, the B-field follows a spiral-like infalling streamer traced by CH3CN. The trans-Alfvenic state of the accreting gas suggests efficient magnetic damping of turbulence and a magnetically regulated, laminar accretion flow feeding the core. Toward MM2, the B-field shows an hourglass morphology fitted by parabolic curves. Two independent methods give a consistent field strength of about 8.1(1.9) mG, and virial analysis indicates that the B-field is dynamically important in delaying collapse of MM2. Within a single protocluster, B-fields can stabilize filaments, regulate accretion, and delay core collapse, highlighting their diverse dynamic role in high-mass star formation.

AI.tldr: 本文利用ALMA 1.2 mm全偏振观测，以730 au分辨率解析了W33 A大质量恒星形成区，揭示了磁场在丝状结构稳定、吸积调控和核心坍缩延迟中的多重动力学作用。
AI.motivation: 磁场在大质量原星团形成中可能起重要作用，但其具体角色尚不明确，因此需要对高分辨率观测下磁场的结构和动力学功能进行深入研究。
AI.method: 使用ALMA 1.2 mm全偏振观测对W33 A区域（距离2.4 kpc）进行成像，角分辨率0.3角秒（730 au），通过线性偏振尘埃辐射推断平面天空磁场结构，并结合CH3CN示踪气体运动进行综合分析。
AI.result: 识别出20个稠密核和9条纤维结构；发现两个近垂直的大尺度磁场分量（NW-SE和NE-SW）以及朝向MM1和MM2的局部磁场特征；在MM1中磁场呈螺旋状吸积流形态，在MM2中呈沙漏形态；通过两种独立方法测得MM2磁场强度约8.1 mG。
AI.conclusion: 磁场在大质量原星团中扮演多重的动力学角色：稳定纤维结构（如F-Main需磁场支持抗径向坍缩）、调控吸积流（MM1中磁阻尼维持层流吸积）、延迟核心坍缩（MM2中磁场在动力学上重要）。

title: HYPERION. The cold ISM of rapidly growing $z>6$ quasars: diverse gas reservoirs, dust enrichment, and feedback signatures
comment: 23 pages; 18 figures, 6 tables. Claudia Maria Pierro, Roberta Tripodi: These authors equally contributed to this work
summary: Luminous QSOs at $z>6$ host some of the most rapidly assembled SMBHs in the early Universe. Characterizing their cold ISM is essential to determine their evolution. We investigate the molecular gas, cold dust, star formation, gas-to-dust ratio, and ionized ISM of ten HYPERION QSOs using new ALMA Band 3 observations targeting CO(6-5) and the underlying $\sim100$ GHz continuum, complemented by archival and literature ALMA/NOEMA data. We detect $\sim100$ GHz continuum emission in eight targets and CO(6-5) emission in four QSO hosts, J025-33, J083+11, J231-20, and J0252-0503, as well as in the companion of J231-20. The inferred molecular gas masses are of order $10^{10}~M_\odot$, while the non-detections imply upper limits of a few $10^9~M_\odot$, indicating a broad range of molecular reservoirs within the HYPERION population. For J025-33 and J083+11, the FIR SEDs are well sampled and yield low dust temperatures, $T_{\rm dust}=36^{+13}_{-7}$ K and $32^{+4}_{-3}$ K, respectively, well below the average value for $z>6$ QSOs. Combining gas and dust masses, we find a gas-to-dust ratio for J083+11, ${\rm GDR}=16^{+5}_{-4}$, among the lowest measured in a high-redshift QSO host. We also detect [NII]$λ205\,μ$m emission in J025-33 and tentatively in J083+11, suggesting dense or highly structured ionized gas. Finally, we identify a tentative connection among $T_{\rm dust}$, the X-ray photon index $Γ$, and the C IV velocity shift. These trends may indicate that more powerful winds redistribute dust away from the central AGN heating source, lowering its temperature and weakening the connection between the large-scale dust reservoir and the X-ray corona. Overall, HYPERION QSOs emerge as a heterogeneous population in which SMBH growth, star formation, gas consumption, enrichment, and feedback are not necessarily synchronized.

AI.tldr: 本文利用ALMA Band 3观测了10个高红移（z>6）HYPERION类星体，探测到CO(6-5)和~100 GHz连续谱发射，发现分子气体质量范围广泛（10^9-10^10 M⊙），并揭示了低尘埃温度、低气尘比等特性，表明该类星体种群在黑洞增长、恒星形成、气体消耗及反馈等方面具有高度异质性。
AI.motivation: 红移z>6的明亮类星体拥有宇宙早期快速增长的超大质量黑洞，表征其冷星际介质（ISM）特性对于理解这类天体的演化至关重要。
AI.method: 使用ALMA Band 3新观测数据，结合档案和文献中的ALMA/NOEMA数据，对10个HYPERION类星体进行CO(6-5)分子谱线及~100 GHz连续谱成像分析，并利用FIR SED拟合提取尘埃温度和气尘比等物理参数。
AI.result: 在8个目标中探测到~100 GHz连续谱，在4个类星体宿主（J025-33、J083+11、J231-20、J0252-0503）及J231-20的伴星系中探测到CO(6-5)发射。分子气体质量约10^10 M⊙，非探测目标上限为10^9 M⊙。J025-33和J083+11的尘埃温度分别为36^+13_-7 K和32^+4_-3 K，远低于z>6类星体平均值；J083+11的气尘比为16^+5_-4，是迄今高红移类星体中最低值之一。此外还探测到[NII]λ205μm发射，并发现尘埃温度与X射线光子指数Γ及C IV速度偏移之间存在潜在关联。
AI.conclusion: HYPERION类星体是一个高度异质的种群，其黑洞增长、恒星形成、气体消耗、金属增丰和反馈过程并不必然同步。尘埃温度与X射线及C IV发射的关联可能表明更强大的外流将尘埃从中心AGN加热源重新分布，降低了尘埃温度并削弱了大尺度尘埃储库与X射线冕之间的联系。

title: Investigating the role of turbulence in the interstellar medium in $z\sim3$ dusty star-forming galaxies using kpc-resolution ALMA dust and gas maps
summary: We present ALMA high-resolution ($\sim$0.25$^{\prime\prime}$/2 kpc) CO(5-4) and CO(4-3) observations of three $z\sim 3$ submillimetre-selected dusty galaxies from the ALESS survey. These data complement existing [sub]-kpc scale ALMA 870$μ$m continuum imaging and JWST NIRCam and MIRI imaging from the ALESS-JWST program, allowing us to trace the molecular gas, dust-obscured star formation, and stellar populations on similar spatial scales. We spectroscopically confirm that two of the sources lie at the same redshift and are likely interacting. We find that the molecular-gas distribution broadly follows the dusty star-forming structures seen in the 870$μ$m dust continuum imaging, but that the gas reservoirs are significantly more extended than the dust emission with a spatial extent comparable to the rest-frame near-infrared stellar emission. By modeling the kinematics for the two highest signal-to-noise sources, we find that the galaxies are well-fit by rotating disc models with high ratios of ordered to random motion ($V_{\rm{max}}/\overlineσ=5\pm1$ and $6\pm1$), although smaller-scale kinematic deviations cannot be ruled out at the current sensitivity and spatial resolution. Finally, utilizing the high-resolution 870$μ$m dust continuum and CO data, we investigate star-formation scaling relations on kpc-scales in these high-redshift galaxies. Assuming a constant CO-to-H$_{2}$ conversion factor and excitation ratio, we find that the data are offset from theoretical star-formation relation predictions that do not take turbulence into account, but consistent with gravo-turbulent models, thereby suggesting that turbulence plays a central role in regulating star formation at high redshift.

AI.tldr: 利用ALMA高分辨率CO(5-4)和CO(4-3)观测三个z~3的亚毫米尘埃星系，发现分子气体分布比尘埃辐射更延展，与恒星辐射尺度相当；运动学建模显示旋转盘结构，且基于kpc尺度的恒星形成标度关系支持湍流在调控高红移恒星形成中的核心作用。
AI.motivation: 高红移尘埃星系的分子气体性质及其与恒星形成的关系尚不明确，缺乏高分辨率多波段协同观测来揭示其内部物理机制。
AI.method: 利用ALMA对三个ALESS巡天中的z~3亚毫米星系进行CO(5-4)和CO(4-3)高分辨率成像，结合ALMA 870μm连续谱和JWST多波段数据，进行运动学建模和kpc尺度标度关系分析。
AI.result: 1) 两个源处于同一红移且可能相互作用；2) 分子气体分布比尘埃辐射更延展，与近红外恒星辐射尺度相当；3) 运动学符合旋转盘模型（V_max/σ=5±1和6±1）；4) kpc尺度标度关系偏离无湍流理论预测，但与引力湍流模型一致。
AI.conclusion: 湍流在高红移星系中调控恒星形成中起核心作用。

title: The Milky Way's Missing In-Situ Halo
comment: 12 pages, 7 figures, submitted to MNRAS, feedback welcome!
summary: The Milky Way's stellar halo preserves a record of its mass assembly history, encoding accretion events in its structural properties. Among the most prominent of these features is a strong break in the halo density profile at $\approx$20-30 kpc, long attributed to the apocenter pile-up of stars from the Gaia-Enceladus/Sausage merger. However, whether this interpretation is consistent with state-of-the-art cosmological simulations remains unclear. In this work, we compare the Milky Way's measured stellar halo density profile between galactocentric radii of $1\unicode{x2013}100$ kpc to those of Milky Way-mass galaxies from the FIRE-2 and Auriga cosmological zoom-in simulation suites, spanning a total of 24 simulated galaxies. We find that simulated halo profiles are significantly steeper than Milky Way measurements within $\approx$15 kpc, and that profile breaks are rare in simulations and never as strong as the Milky Way's. Of the three galaxies with statistically significant breaks, only one exhibits a break attributable to apocenter pile-up of an accreted merger remnant. Decomposing the simulated profiles, we find that the accreted halo profiles are broadly consistent with Milky Way measurements, while the in-situ halo dominates within $\approx$20 kpc and drives the discrepancy. These results raise a compelling question: where is the Milky Way's in-situ halo? The origin of this tension may reflect systematic biases in current halo measurements, an overproduction of early spheroidal star formation in cosmological simulations, or more fundamental differences in the underlying physics (e.g., dark matter) governing the assembly and structure of the inner Galaxy.

AI.tldr: 银河系恒星晕密度轮廓在约20-30千秒差距处存在显著断裂，传统上归因于Gaia-Enceladus/Sausage并合事件的远心点堆积。然而，比较24个FIRE-2和Auriga宇宙学模拟星系发现，模拟的晕轮廓在15千秒差距内比实际银河系陡峭得多，且断裂现象罕见且强度远不及银河系。分解显示，吸积晕与观测基本一致，但内部原住晕驱动了差异。这引发了"银河系原住晕去哪了"的问题，可能反映测量偏差、模拟中早期球状恒星形成过多，或暗物质等基础物理的差异。
AI.motivation: 银河系恒星晕中存在的密度断裂（~20-30 kpc）长期被解释为Gaia-Enceladus/Sausage并合事件的遗迹，但这一解释是否与先进宇宙学模拟一致尚不清楚。本文旨在通过对比真实观测与模拟数据，检验该传统解释的合理性。
AI.method: 将银河系1-100 kpc范围内的恒星晕密度轮廓测量结果，与FIRE-2和Auriga两组宇宙学zoom-in模拟套件中的24个银河系质量级模拟星系进行系统性比较。
AI.result: 模拟星系的晕轮廓在~15 kpc内显著陡于银河系实测值；模拟中密度断裂罕见，且强度远不及银河系；三个具有统计显著断裂的模拟星系中，仅一个可归因于并合残骸的远心点堆积。分解显示吸积晕与观测一致，但原住晕（in-situ halo）主导内部区域并造成差异。
AI.conclusion: 现有模拟无法复现银河系恒星晕的密度断裂特征，主要矛盾在于原住晕的差异。这可能源于观测系统偏差、模拟对早期球状星形成的高估，或暗物质等基础物理的差异，需进一步研究确认。

title: GATOS N: Extended circumnuclear dust emission in nearby Seyfert galaxies surveyed by JWST/MIRI
summary: The subarcsecond angular resolution and stable background of JWST has given us the first high-fidelity images of the arcsecond-scale environment around Active Galactic Nuclei (AGNs) in the nearby Universe. With mid-infrared (MIR) surface brightness sensitivities that are much deeper than the best ground-based instruments, the Mid-InfraRed Instrument imager (MIRIM) now allows us to understand the structure and thermal properties of dust using information over wavelengths of $5$-$25$ $μ$m, almost all of the MIR range. We present a Cycle 1 JWST MIRIM survey of Seyfert galaxies with the express aim of characterising AGN-heated dust in the central few 100 pcs, and searching for signatures of dust-laden nuclear outflows. This paper outlines the motivation behind the programme, the data reduction and analysis techniques used to isolate the nuclear and extended emission, and a comparison of the observed MIR structures with those seen in other phases (stars, ionised and molecular gas, absorbing dust). In concert with earlier studies that used these data, we conclude that resolved AGN-heated dust is widespread in the Seyfert population, extending out to a few hundred pcs from the nucleus and often displaying a higher surface-brightness compared to the more widespread star-forming dusty circumnuclear disk. Even after accounting for contamination from emission lines in the MIRI filters, we find strong spatial correlations between MIR dust emission and the AGN-ionised gas in the narrow-line region (NLR).

AI.tldr: 本文利用JWST MIRIM对塞弗特星系进行巡天观测，在亚角秒分辨率下研究AGN加热尘埃的结构和热性质，发现AGN加热尘埃广泛存在于塞弗特星系中，延伸至核外数百秒差距，并与窄线区电离气体有强烈空间相关性。
AI.motivation: JWST提供了前所未有的高分辨率中红外成像能力，能够深入探测AGN周围百秒差距尺度的尘埃结构和热性质，并寻找尘埃负载的核外流特征。
AI.method: 利用JWST MIRIM对塞弗特星系进行Cycle 1巡天观测，覆盖5-25 μm中红外波段，通过数据归约和分析技术分离核区和延展发射，并将中红外结构与恒星、电离气体、分子气体及吸收尘埃等其他相进行对比。
AI.result: 分辨出的AGN加热尘埃在塞弗特星系中广泛存在，延伸至核外数百秒差距，表面亮度通常高于星暴加热的环核尘埃盘；中红外尘埃发射与窄线区AGN电离气体之间存在强空间相关性。
AI.conclusion: AGN加热的尘埃在塞弗特星系中普遍存在且可分辨，其结构与AGN电离气体密切相关，表明尘埃在AGN反馈过程中扮演重要角色。

title: Probing Direct Contributions of Galaxies and AGN to Cosmic Reionization in a Quasar Field J0226+0302 with JWST NIRCam and NIRSpec
comment: Submitted to AAS Journals; 21 pages, 13 figures, 1 table. Comments are welcomed
summary: We present JWST Cycle 2 NIRCam and NIRSpec observations in a quasar field J0226+0302 at z=6.5412 to probe the direct connections between the intergalactic medium (IGM), galaxies, and AGN during reionization. This field was previously observed by the JWST ASPIRE program and eight [OIII]-emitting galaxies were detected at 5.3<z<6.4 with a single NIRCam pointing. Using new NIRCam and NIRSpec observations, we identify 65 additional line-emitting galaxies at 5.3<z<6.4. The IGM-galaxy cross-correlation function shows a ~2 sigma excess IGM transmission at ~10-40 cMpc from galaxies when compared with the average IGM transmission, suggesting a significant contribution from regions traced by star-forming galaxies to the local ionizing background during reionization. The IGM-galaxy cross-correlation function is consistent with THESAN simulations with an IGM neutral fraction of 5%-7% and an average ionizing photon escape fraction f_esc of 6% from galaxies. Among 49 line-emitting galaxies observed by NIRSpec, we identify four AGN through detection of broad H-alpha emission lines with an AGN fraction of (8+/-4)%. By measuring the IGM effective optical depth around the AGN and the IGM-AGN cross-correlation function, we find that the IGM transmission is higher within 5 cMpc/h of the AGN than around the majority of [OIII] emitters. We interpret the excess IGM transmission as resulting from the local radiation enhancement by the AGN, and estimate f_esc of 50%-100% of the AGN from the IGM-AGN cross-correlation function. Future JWST NIRSpec observations in quasar fields will yield a more constraining IGM-AGN cross-correlation function, providing further insights into the roles of galaxies and AGN in reionization.

AI.tldr: 利用JWST NIRCam和NIRSpec观测类星体场J0226+0302（z=6.5412），发现65个额外发射线星系，通过IGM-星系交叉相关函数发现星系周围IGM透射率超出约2σ，结合THESAN模拟推断IGM中性分数为5%-7%、星系平均逃逸分数为6%；同时识别出4个AGN（占比8±4%），发现AGN周围5 cMpc/h内IGM透射率更高，其逃逸分数达50%-100%。
AI.motivation: 探究再电离时期IGM、星系与AGN之间的直接联系，理解星系和AGN对再电离过程的贡献。
AI.method: 利用JWST NIRCam和NIRSpec新观测数据，识别发射线星系；计算IGM-星系交叉相关函数和IGM-AGN交叉相关函数；与THESAN模拟对比以约束中性分数和逃逸分数。
AI.result: 识别65个额外星系；IGM-星系交叉相关显示~2σ过剩透射率；模拟约束中性分数5%-7%、星系逃逸分数6%；发现4个AGN（8±4%），AGN周围IGM透射率更高，AGN逃逸分数50%-100%。
AI.conclusion: 星暴星系和AGN局域辐射对再电离有显著贡献，AGN的逃逸分数远高于星系；未来JWST NIRSpec观测可进一步约束IGM-AGN交叉相关函数。

title: Galaxy Spiral Arm Count vs. Concentration and Mass: A First Look with Euclid
summary: Using catalogued information from Euclid Quick Data Release 1, we compare 2-armed and 3-armed spiral galaxies as classified by the Euclid Zoobot software. Two-armed galaxies have larger concentrations, lower stellar masses (M*), and lower star formation rates (SFRs) on average than 3-armed galaxies. For a given M*, 2-armed galaxies have larger concentrations than 3-armed galaxies. These trends have been seen before in nearby galaxies; with Euclid we extend the patterns to redshifts z = 0.4 - 1. Two-armed galaxies have lower SFRs because they have lower masses; at fixed M*, 2-armed and 3-armed galaxies have similar SFRs. We see a bend in the concentration-log M* relation for 2-armed galaxies at M* = 10^10.3 M(sun). Above this mass, 2-armed galaxies show significantly larger concentrations than their lower mass counterparts. The observed concentrations of 2-armed galaxies decrease with increasing redshift, perhaps from morphological K-corrections and resolution differences. About 60% - 70% of Euclid spirals are 2-armed, and about 15% - 20% are 3-armed. One-armed galaxies are rare, with low masses compared to 2-armed spirals. We compare these statistics with Galaxy Zoo Sloan Digital Sky Survey arm counts at low z, and tentatively with JWST at higher z. We discuss these results in terms of theoretical models of spiral arm generation and evolution, and compare with statistics of grand design, multi-armed, and flocculent galaxies. There is a need for more quantitative measurements of arm structure beyond arm counts provided by the Zoobot/Galaxy Zoo or the three standard arm classes.

AI.tldr: 本文利用Euclid快速数据发布1中的分类信息，比较了由Zoobot软件识别的2旋臂和3旋臂旋涡星系，发现2旋臂星系具有更高的浓度、更低的恒星质量和恒星形成率，并将这些模式扩展到红移z=0.4-1。约60%-70%的Euclid旋涡星系为2旋臂，15%-20%为3旋臂。
AI.motivation: 利用Euclid数据将旋涡星系旋臂数目与其物理性质（浓度、恒星质量、恒星形成率）的关系研究扩展到更高红移范围，并与近邻星系及理论模型进行对比。
AI.method: 使用Euclid快速数据发布1的目录信息，通过Zoobot软件对2旋臂和3旋臂旋涡星系进行分类比较，分析浓度、恒星质量、恒星形成率等参数，并统计不同旋臂数目的占比。
AI.result: 2旋臂星系平均浓度更高，恒星质量和恒星形成率更低；在固定恒星质量下，2旋臂和3旋臂星系的恒星形成率相似。2旋臂星系在浓度-恒星质量关系中出现拐点。约60%-70%的Euclid旋涡星系为2旋臂，15%-20%为3旋臂。
AI.conclusion: 研究结果与近邻星系趋势一致，并扩展到更高红移。需要更定量的旋臂结构测量方法，而非仅依靠旋臂计数。

title: Constraints with CMB lensing on dark matter decays to massive decay products
summary: Motivated by the recent measurements by the Dark Energy Spectroscopic Instrument (DESI) which suggest a late-time matter density approximately 5\% lower than that inferred from Planck we investigate models in which dark matter decays to two less massive, and thus warm, states. The decaying dark matter (DDM) models are parameterized by the fraction $f$ of dark matter that decays, the decay rate $Γ$, and the fraction $\varepsilon$ of the mass retained by the decay products. To efficiently explore the warm decay product regime, we employ \texttt{CLASSIER-DDM}, a modified version of the public Boltzmann solver \texttt{CLASS} that solves the perturbation equations with DDM via an integral-equation method. We consider DESI DR2 baryon acoustic oscillations and Planck 2018 CMB data including lensing, and find that DDM models are not favored over the $Λ$CDM model. This result arises because CMB lensing tightly constrains the velocity kicks imparted to decay products. For example, for $f\simeq0.5$, we find $1σ$ constraints to the decay-product kick velocities an order of $10^{-2}$ to $10^{-3}$ times the speed of light for decay redshifts from shortly after recombination until today. Nonetheless, the allowed parameter space includes models with sufficient power suppression at small-scales to potentially address dwarf galaxy anomalies. Our results also suggest that explanations for DESI that involve dark-matter decays to one massive and one massless particle will be constrained by CMB lensing.

AI.tldr: 本文研究暗物质衰变为较轻粒子的模型，发现该类模型虽不被DESI和Planck数据偏好，但部分参数空间可解释小尺度星系异常，且宇宙微波背景透镜效应对暗物质衰变产物速度有严格限制。
AI.motivation: DESI近期测量表明晚期物质密度比Planck推断的低约5%，为解释这一差异，研究暗物质衰变为两个较轻（温暗物质）状态的模型。
AI.method: 使用改进的CLASSIER-DDM求解器，通过积分方程方法处理暗物质衰变的扰动方程，结合DESI DR2重子声学振荡数据和Planck 2018 CMB数据（含透镜效应）进行参数约束。
AI.result: DDM模型不被ΛCDM模型偏好；CMB透镜效应对衰变产物速度有严格限制（f≈0.5时，速度约束在10⁻²至10⁻³倍光速）；允许的参数空间可提供足够的小尺度功率抑制以解释矮星系异常。
AI.conclusion: 暗物质衰变解释DESI异常受CMB透镜效应严重制约，但模型仍保留解决小尺度问题的潜力；对暗物质衰变为一个重粒子一个无质量粒子的解释同样受约束。

recommendation.reason: 与 Zotero 兴趣画像中的 lensing, dark matter, dark energy 等主题/作者匹配。

title: Direct detection of cool molecular gas in a star-forming galaxy at $z=7.31$
comment: Accepted for publication in MNRAS. Main text: 17 pages, 6 figures
summary: We investigate the molecular gas content and interstellar medium (ISM) conditions of REBELS-25, a massive, star-forming galaxy at $z=7.31$. Deep VLA Q-band and ALMA Band 3 observations reveal CO(3-2) and CO(7-6) emission (both at $\sim3.5σ$), and provide an upper limit on [C I](2-1). From the CMB-corrected CO(3-2) flux-representing the highest-redshift detection of a low-$J$ CO transition to date-we derive a molecular gas mass of $M_{\rm mol}=(1.0\pm0.4)\times10^{11}\,(α_{\rm CO}/(3\,$M$_{\odot}$(K$\,$\kms$\,$pc$^2)^{-1}))\,$M$_{\odot}$, directly confirming the presence of a very massive gas reservoir only $\simeq700\,$Myr after the Big Bang. This implies an extreme gas fraction of $f_{\rm gas}\simeq0.95$, a gas-to-dust ratio of $δ_{\rm GDR}\simeq6\times10^2$, and a depletion timescale of $τ_{\rm dep}\simeq1.2\,$Gyr, broadly consistent with extrapolated scaling relations for main-sequence galaxies at lower redshift. Using the radiative transfer code TUNER, we self-consistently model CO and dust continuum emission in the context of the significant CMB background, constraining ISM properties and recovering $M_{\rm mol}= (1.8^{+1.0}_{-0.9})\times10^{11}\,$M$_{\odot}$, independent of assumptions about $r_{31}$ and $α_{\rm CO}$. We further discuss the use of alternative molecular gas tracers at early epochs. Combining CO and [C II] measurements, we infer an empirical [C II]-to-H$_2$ conversion factor of $α_{\rm [C II]}=(60\pm25)\,$M$_{\odot}$/L$_{\odot}$, suggesting [C II] remains a viable molecular gas tracer in the Epoch of Reionization. These results demonstrate the detectability of low-$J$ CO emission even at $z>7$, paving the way for next-generation facilities, and provide critical insights into the rapid mass assembly of galaxies during the first billion years of cosmic history.

AI.tldr: 该研究通过探测z=7.31星系REBELS-25的CO(3-2)和CO(7-6)发射线，确认了宇宙大爆炸后仅7亿年就存在一个极端巨大的分子气体库（约10¹¹ M☉），气体分数高达95%，并验证了[C II]作为早期宇宙分子气体示踪剂的可行性。
AI.motivation: 研究动机是探索早期宇宙（再电离时代）星系的分子气体含量和星际介质条件，以理解星系在宇宙最初十亿年内的快速质量积累过程。
AI.method: 利用VLA Q波段和ALMA Band 3观测CO(3-2)和CO(7-6)发射线，结合辐射传输代码TUNER自洽建模CO和尘埃连续谱发射，并考虑宇宙微波背景（CMB）的影响。
AI.result: 探测到CO(3-2)和CO(7-6)发射（均约3.5σ），获得分子气体质量约1.0×10¹¹ M☉（依赖α_CO假设）或1.8×10¹¹ M☉（通过TUNER建模），气体分数约0.95，气体尘埃比约600，消耗时标约1.2 Gyr，并推导出[C II]-H₂转换因子为60±25 M☉/L☉。
AI.conclusion: 该工作直接证实了z>7星系中低J CO发射的可探测性，为下一代观测设施铺平道路，并表明[C II]在再电离时代仍是可行的分子气体示踪剂，揭示了早期星系快速质量积累的关键信息。

recommendation.reason: 与 Zotero 兴趣画像中的 molecular, molecular gas, alma, dust 等主题/作者匹配。

title: COSMOS-Web: A Multi-wavelength Morphological Catalog of ~780,000 Galaxies
summary: We present multi-wavelength morphological measurements for all galaxies in the COSMOS-Web survey, i.e., $\sim$780,000 galaxies contained in the COSMOS2025 catalog. We perform both parametric (e.g., single and double Sérsic modeling) and non-parametric (e.g., Gini-$M_{20}$) morphology analyses in four NIRCam bands, independently. Our parametric fits reveal a strong correlation between galaxy structure and star formation activity up to $z\sim4$, as evidenced by the dependence of the Sérsic index ($n_{\rm sérsic}$) and bulge-to-total ratio ($B/T$) on the position of the star formation rate-stellar mass plane. A tight correlation between $n_{\rm sérsic}$ and $B/T$ is observed. The evolution of $n_{\rm sérsic}$ and $B/T$ depends on stellar mass; for example, the median $n_{\rm sérsic}$ increases from $\sim1$ at $z\sim6$ to $\sim2.5$ at $z\sim2$ for massive galaxies with $M_*>10^{10.5} M_{\odot}$, while lower mass galaxies remain $n_{\rm sérsic}\sim1.2$ at all epochs. The UV $n_{\rm sérsic}$ values are systematically smaller than those in the optical, although both exhibit similar evolutionary trends. From non-parametric analyses, we demonstrate the distribution of galaxies on the Gini-$M_{20}$ and asymmetry-concentration planes, and find that morphological classifications based on non-parametric indicators are consistent with those derived from the Sérsic index. The resulting catalog provides the largest and most detailed set of JWST multi-wavelength morphological measurements to date, serving as a valuable community resource for studies of structural transformation, bulge growth, and galaxy-supermassive black hole coevolution across cosmic time.

AI.tldr: 本文利用COSMOS-Web巡天数据，对约78万个星系进行多波段（4个NIRCam波段）形态学测量，包括参数化（单/双Sérsic模型）和非参数化（Gini-M20）分析，揭示了星系结构与恒星形成活动在红移z~4以内的强相关性，并提供了迄今为止最大规模的JWST多波长形态测量目录。
AI.motivation: 现有星系形态学研究在红移范围、样本规模和波长覆盖方面仍存在局限，缺乏大规模、多波段的JWST高分辨率形态测量数据，难以系统研究星系结构演化及其与恒星形成活动、黑洞共演化之间的关系。
AI.method: 利用COSMOS-Web巡天中约78万个星系的COSMOS2025星表数据，独立在四个NIRCam波段进行参数化形态分析（单/双Sérsic模型拟合，提取Sérsic指数n和 bulge-to-total比值B/T）和非参数化形态分析（Gini系数、M20、不对称性、聚集度等指标），并与恒星级质量、恒星形成率位置等信息进行关联分析。
AI.result: 1) 星系结构与恒星形成活动在z~4以内存在强相关，Sérsic指数和B/T依赖于恒星形成率-恒星质量平面位置；2) n与B/T之间存在紧密相关性；3) 大质量星系（M*>10^10.5 M⊙）的n从z~6时的~1增长到z~2时的~2.5，而低质量星系始终保持n~1.2；4) UV波段的n系统性地小于光学波段，但演化趋势相似；5) 非参数化形态分类与Sérsic指数分类结果一致。
AI.conclusion: 本研究提供了迄今为止最大规模、最详细的JWST多波段星系形态测量目录，可作为研究星系结构演化、核球增长及星系-超大质量黑洞共演化的重要公共资源，并证实了高红移下星系结构与恒星形成活动的紧密耦合关系。

recommendation.reason: 与 Zotero 兴趣画像中的 jwst, star formation rate, cosmic time, formation rate 等主题/作者匹配。
